title: Easy Eat
description: EasyEat Mod is a client-side Minecraft mod that allows you to easily consume food items from your hotbar with holding down the hotbar key.
body:
## EasyEat Mod is a client-side Minecraft mod that allows you to easily consume food items from your hotbar by holding down the hotbar key.

### Features
Client-Side: Works purely client side, improving QoL.

### How do I use it?
Hold down the designated hotbar key while having food items in your hotbar slot to consume them.
![easy eat gif example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db47ea75ba593f22ca9b710f4617872a70c7c200.gif)
